tasks.cmd: sudo zfs snapshot -r "tank@pre-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-hvac-005" && echo 'ZFS snapshot OK'
cd /srv/monorepo/scripts/hvac-rag && python3 -c "from hvac_chunk import docling_convert; print('docling OK')"

cd /srv/monorepo/scripts/hvac-rag && /srv/data/hvac-rag/.venv/bin/python3 hvac_manual_enrich.py '/srv/hvac-pipeline/DATA/PDF/Manual de serviço VRV - VI - SiLA342429B.pdf' --out-dir /srv/data/hvac-rag/processed --index

cd /srv/monorepo/scripts/hvac-rag && /srv/data/hvac-rag/.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json
with open('/srv/data/hvac-rag/processed/faq/Manual de serviço VRV - VI - SiLA342429B_faq.json') as f:
    d=json.load(f)
    assert d['metadata']['qa_count'] >= 20, 'too few QA'
    print('QA count:', d['metadata']['qa_count'])
"

export K=$(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && curl -s -X PUT -H "api-key: $K" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:6333/collections/hvac_manuals_v1/index -d '{"field_name":"brand","field_schema":{"type":"keyword","is_tenant":true}}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('status:', d.get('status','?'))"

export K=$(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && curl -s -H "api-key: $K" http://localhost:6333/collections/hvac_manuals_v1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); idx=d['result']['payload_schema'].get('brand',{}); print('tenant:', idx.get('is_tenant',False))"
cd /srv/monorepo && grep -n 'Filter' cmd/swarm/main.go internal/memory/qdrant_layer.go | head -5 || echo 'no filter yet'
sudo systemctl restart swarm-engine && sleep 5 && curl -sf http://localhost:8643/health && echo ' [swarm UP]'
curl -sf http://localhost:8643/health && curl -sf http://localhost:8642/health && echo 'ALL UP'

export K=$(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && curl -s -H "api-key: $K" http://localhost:6333/collections/hvac_manuals_v1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); pts=d['result']['points_count']; print('Points:', pts); assert pts > 0"
